---
id: create-space
title: "创建空间"
description: "创建一个空间。当 parentSpaceId 为空时创建顶级空间；不为空时，在该空间下创建子空间。"
sidebar_label: "创建空间"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/aiot-api/aiot-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"创建空间"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/spaces"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



创建一个空间。当 parentSpaceId 为空时创建顶级空间；不为空时，在该空间下创建子空间。

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"Accesstoken","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Accesstoken}}"},"description":"通过授权获取的访问 Token。"},{"name":"Appid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Appid}}"},"description":"在 [Aqara 开发者平台](https://developer.aqara.com/) 创建应用时分配的 App ID。"},{"name":"Keyid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Keyid}}"},"description":"在 [Aqara 开发者平台](https://developer.aqara.com/) 创建应用时分配的 Key ID。"},{"name":"Nonce","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Nonce}}"},"description":"随机字符串，每次请求都不同。"},{"name":"Time","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Time}}"},"description":"请求时间戳，单位毫秒。"},{"name":"Sign","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Sign}}"},"description":"请求签名。如需了解签名生成方法，请参考 [Sign 生成规则](https://opendoc.aqara.cn/docs/%E4%BA%91%E5%BC%80%E5%8F%91/API%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E6%8C%87%E5%8D%97/Sign%E7%94%9F%E6%88%90%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99.html)。"},{"name":"Lang","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["zh","en"],"example":"en"},"description":"语言，默认英文。支持 'zh', 'en' 两种语言。"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["name"],"properties":{"parentSpaceId":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"父空间 ID ；为空时创建顶级空间。"},"name":{"type":"string","minLength":1,"description":"空间名称，不能为空字符串。"},"settings":{"type":"object","description":"空间配置属性。","properties":{"gmtTimeZone":{"type":"string","description":"标准 GMT 格式时区，如 GMT+08:00。","example":"GMT+08:00"},"locationId":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"家庭位置标识，支持经纬度串（如 \"123.456,78.90\"）或城市编码（如 \"30372\"）。","example":"123.456,78.90"},"autoAdjustDst":{"type":"boolean","default":true,"description":"是否自动适应夏令时（Daylight Saving Time）。"}},"title":"SpaceSettings"}},"example":{"parentSpaceId":"space-home-001","name":"客厅","settings":{"gmtTimeZone":"GMT+08:00","locationId":"123.456,78.90","autoAdjustDst":true}},"title":"CreateSpaceRequest"},"example":{"parentSpaceId":"space-home-001","name":"客厅","settings":{"gmtTimeZone":"GMT+08:00","locationId":"123.456,78.90","autoAdjustDst":true}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"请求发起成功","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"消息类型。"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"接口版本。","example":"v4"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"消息 ID。"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"业务状态码，0 表示成功"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息。"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"string","description":"新创建的空间
